title: Everside
description: Expands the every side like Adventure, RPG, Bosses, Dimesions, Tech and more!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a68848c73f6aa391117f4810ce67f70d39a8b285.png)

## Expands the every side of Minecraft!
- **This modpack has a lot of overhaul mods in combat, biomes, dungeons, buildings, enemies, swords, armors and trinkets! Tech included!**


## Features
![Prism](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/972218555330355211/1049048621758300170/Prism.png)

- ✅ Awesome Biome Overhauls In Overworld, Nether And The End

- ✅ New Dimensions And Stories! 

- ✅ New Enemies, Dungeons And Structures!

- ✅ New Bosses Even Better Than Warden!

- ✅ New Gears Even Better Than Netherite

- ✅ All 1.19 And 1.20 Contents

- ✅ Shaders And Optimization Mods (No Optifine Needed!)

- ✅ Tons Of "Quality Of Life" Mods!

## Keyboard Layout
![Keyboard](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/972218555330355211/1066396583874273310/layout.png)

## Need A Server?

[![Server](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1067121218198716547/1067204390819217509/Everside.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=79)
 

(You should use at least 4GB of ram. 5 or 6GB is recommended for client.)

## Some Of The Mods!
- [Structory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory) 
- [Structory: Towers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory-towers)
